meta.title: LOCO Complex — Entertainment & Music Venue · District 1, Saigon
meta.description: LOCO Complex — NEWTRO entertainment complex at 11 Nam Quoc Cang, District 1, Saigon. 2-floor club + F&B. Tue – Sun, 6 PM. Book: 0866 433 754.

hero.heading: LOCO
hero.desc: An upscale entertainment destination in the heart of District 1. Two floors, two music worlds — one limitless experience.

about.heading: Where style meets energy
about.description: LOCO Complex is a NEWTRO entertainment complex — where elegance blends with youthful energy. Outdoor terrace, game zone, massage chairs, personal lockers — every detail crafted for the perfect experience.

music.heading: Each floor, each vibe
music.floor1Desc: A dynamic hip-hop space with professional DJs. B Tables, Standing, L-Zone Sofa, VIP and SVIP — from small groups to big parties.
music.floor1Tables: B Table (1-4 guests) · Standing · L-Zone Sofa (1-8) · VIP (1-10) · SVIP (1-12)
music.floor2Desc: Mini nightclub with top-tier sound & lighting. Top 40, EDM, House — where the night never ends.
music.floor2Tables: Standing (1-4 guests) · Premium Sofa (1-8) · VIP Sofa (1-15)

contact.heading: Book a Table
contact.note: Prices exclude 10% VAT and 10% service charge

menuPage.heading: Menu
menuPage.bitesDesc: Diverse menu served all night long.
menuPage.vipDesc: From 3.5 – 30 million VND depending on location and party size. Excludes 10% VAT and 10% service charge.

datban.metaTitle: Book a Table at LOCO Complex — Reserve Now · District 1, Saigon
datban.metaDescription: Book a table at LOCO Complex, 11 Nam Quoc Cang, District 1, Saigon. Free reservations, Zalo confirmation in 15 min. Hotline: 0866 433 754.

hero.heading: LOCO
hero.desc: A vibrant entertainment complex in the heart of District 1. Two floors, two music worlds — one limitless experience.
hero.intro: NEWTRO entertainment complex in the heart of District 1. 2 club floors — Hip-hop & Heatroom (EDM, Top 40, House). Dining by BITES. Up to 300 guests.

social.sub: What guests say about their night at LOCO

reviews.text: Incredible vibe, top-tier DJ sets, comfortable VIP tables and attentive staff. Will definitely be back!
reviews.author: Minh Khoa

reviews.text: LOCO Heatroom on Floor 2 is the most chill spot I've been to in Saigon. EDM + House is outstanding, stunning stage lighting.
reviews.author: Thanh Linh

reviews.text: Booked through the form, got Zalo confirmation in 10 minutes. Walked straight in, no waiting. Super convenient!
reviews.author: Duc Anh

tiers.sub: 8 table tiers across 2 club floors. Pick the option that matches your group.
tiers.notePill: Free booking — pay at the venue
tiers.footnote: * Minimum spend per table. Prices exclude 10% VAT + 10% service fee. Guests freely select sets matching the minimum spend per table.

banner.h2: TONIGHT IS YOURS — RESERVE AT LOCO NOW
banner.sub: Free booking · Zalo confirmation in 15 minutes · 24/7 hotline

form.formSub: Fill in the form below. We'll confirm via Zalo within 5 minutes.
form.successSub: We'll confirm your reservation via Zalo within 15 minutes.
form.errorMissingTitle: Please fill in all required fields.

items.a: No. Reservations at LOCO Complex are completely free — no deposit, no booking fee. You only pay when you arrive.

items.q: How long is my table held?
items.a: We hold your table for 30 minutes past the reserved time. If you're running late, please call the hotline to let us know.
Yes. Contact hotline 0866 433 754 or message us on Zalo at least 2 hours before your reservation to reschedule for free.
Youthful and smart casual. No flip-flops, shorts, or sportswear. LOCO Complex is for guests aged 18 and over.
Yes, there is nearby parking and overnight vehicle storage. Staff will guide you to the nearest parking upon arrival.

datban.footer: 11 Nam Quoc Cang Street, Pham Ngu Lao Ward, District 1, HCMC · © 2025 LOCO Complex · For guests aged 18 and over.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: LOCO Complex is committed to protecting our guests' personal information. This policy describes how we collect, use, and safeguard data when you visit lococomplex.vn or book a table via our website / hotline.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
body: When you book via the website form, we collect: full name, phone number, reservation date and time, party size, table tier, and special notes (if any).
While browsing, our system records basic technical info such as IP, device, browser, and pages visited via Google Analytics and Vercel Analytics — for website performance analysis.

sections.title: 2. Purpose of Use
body: Reservation info is used to confirm your booking via hotline 0866 433 754 or Zalo, prepare your table, and send pre-arrival reminders if needed.
Website analytics helps us improve user experience, optimize content, and measure Google Ads / Facebook campaign performance.

sections.title: 3. Data Sharing
body: LOCO Complex does NOT sell, rent, or trade personal information for commercial purposes.
Data may be shared with: (a) technical partners providing hosting (Vercel) and analytics (Google) under their privacy terms; (b) authorities upon legitimate request.

sections.title: 4. Storage and Security
body: Reservation info is stored in LOCO Complex's internal system, with restricted access for booking management staff only.
We apply technical measures including HTTPS, security headers, and access authentication to protect data from unauthorized access.

sections.title: 5. Customer Rights
body: You have the right to access, modify, or request deletion of personal information by contacting hotline 0866 433 754 or Zalo.
You can opt out of reminders or promotional notifications at any time.

sections.title: 6. Cookies and Similar Technologies
body: lococomplex.vn uses cookies and similar technologies (Google Analytics, Vercel Analytics, Google Ads conversion tracking) for measurement and experience improvement.
You can disable cookies via browser settings — some functionality may be affected.

sections.title: 7. Contact
body: For privacy-related questions, contact LOCO Complex via hotline 0866 433 754 or Zalo https://zalo.me/0866433754.
Address: 11 Nam Quoc Cang Street, Pham Ngu Lao Ward, District 1, HCMC.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using lococomplex.vn or LOCO Complex's reservation service, you agree to comply with the following terms.

sections.title: 1. Eligibility
body: LOCO Complex is an entertainment venue for guests aged 18 and above. By booking or visiting, you confirm you meet the age requirement and agree to present valid ID upon request.

sections.title: 2. Reservations and Confirmation
body: The online booking form is a request to hold a table — officially confirmed once LOCO Complex contacts you via hotline 0866 433 754 or Zalo within 15 minutes.
Tables are held up to 30 minutes past the reserved time. Beyond that without notice, LOCO Complex may seat other guests.

sections.title: 3. Cancellation or Rescheduling
body: Free cancellation or rescheduling at least 2 hours before the reserved time via hotline / Zalo.
For VIP tables or private events with deposit, refund policy will be specified at the deposit stage.

sections.title: 4. Venue Rules
body: Dress code: Smart Casual, Newtro, Streetwear encouraged. LOCO Complex reserves the right to refuse service for non-compliant attire.
Prohibited items: drugs, weapons, or anything violating Vietnamese law.
Guests must follow staff guidance on security, fire safety, and house rules.

sections.title: 5. Liability
body: LOCO Complex is not responsible for personal belongings lost in unmonitored areas.
Guests are responsible for their own health while using services. Notify staff in advance of any health conditions.

sections.title: 6. Intellectual Property
body: All content on lococomplex.vn (logo, images, text, video) is property of LOCO Complex. Copying or commercial use without written consent is copyright infringement.

sections.title: 7. Changes to Terms
body: LOCO Complex may update these terms at any time. New versions take effect upon publication at lococomplex.vn/en/terms with the updated date.
Questions: contact hotline 0866 433 754 or Zalo https://zalo.me/0866433754.
